command: echo '=== Wine debug: trace file operations for .ex5 ===' && export DISPLAY=:99 WINEPREFIX=/root/.wine && rm -f '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>/dev/null && WINEDEBUG=+file timeout 60 wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MetaEditor64.exe' /compile:'/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' /log 2>&1 | grep -i 'ex5\|error\|fail\|denied\|cannot' | head -30 && echo '=== Check Wine version ===' && wine --version 2>&1 && echo '=== Try with regular wine (not staging features) ===' && export STAGING_WRITECOPY=0 WINE_STAGING_DISABLE_ALL=1 && rm -f '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>/dev/null && timeout 60 wine '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MetaEditor64.exe' /compile:'/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.mq5' /log 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "Exit2: $?" && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== File size ===' && wc -c < '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .ex5 created'
